title: cystea fragilis
intro: Cystea fragilis is a plant that belongs to the Rubiaceae family and is commonly known as the 'fragile cup' due to its delicate shape. The plant contains bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids, which are known to possess medicinal properties, particularly in their antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. Cystea fragilis has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, digestive problems, and respiratory infections, due to its ability to stimulate the immune system and provide anti-bacterial properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are commonly consumed to harness its health benefits and medicinal properties.
